# Commission-Calc.com

Free real estate commission calculator — estimate agent fees, closing costs, and net proceeds for home sales across the USA, Canada, Australia, UK, and Germany.

## About
https://commission-calc.com/

## Tools
https://commission-calc.com/
https://commission-calc.com/closing-costs/
https://commission-calc.com/seller-net/
